evals.name: preserve-code-while-localizing-german-prose
evals.prompt: Fix the quotation marks and number-unit spacing in this German UI copy, but do not alter JSX attributes, code examples, URLs, or product identifiers.
evals.expected: Uses the German profile and changes only visible prose, preserving code, attributes, URLs, identifiers, and existing intentional house-style choices.

evals.name: distinguish-french-canadian-spacing
evals.prompt: Normalize punctuation spacing in a fr-CA checkout message that contains a colon, semicolon, question mark, and exclamation mark.
evals.expected: Uses the French profile's regional guidance and does not apply fr-FR spacing rules universally to Canadian French.

evals.name: delegate-dynamic-values-to-intl
evals.prompt: Format prices, dates, and measurements for a mixed German and English dashboard by manually choosing separators and currency position in templates.
evals.expected: Recommends locale-aware APIs for dynamic values, keeps display formatting separate from business data, and asks for exact locales where regional choices matter.

evals.name: apply-spanish-dialogue-and-question-marks
evals.prompt: Localize a Spanish interview transcript that contains dialogue, nested quotations, and questions while preserving product names and timestamps.
evals.expected: Uses the Spanish profile for inverted question marks, dialogue punctuation, and quotation hierarchy while preserving identifiers, timestamps, meaning, and supplied regional house style.

evals.name: distinguish-polish-and-czech-quotation-rules
evals.prompt: Apply one generic Central European quotation and dash style to both Polish and Czech release notes.
evals.expected: Rejects a shared generic profile, loads the Polish and Czech guidance separately, applies their quotation and dash conventions only to visible prose, and preserves code and version identifiers.

evals.name: ask-for-the-scandinavian-locale
evals.prompt: Polish this Scandinavian checkout copy. The language and region are not specified, so choose Swedish, Danish, or Norwegian rules interchangeably.
evals.expected: Asks for the exact language and region or keeps the text unchanged where the choice matters; does not collapse Swedish, Danish, and Norwegian typography into one profile.
